---
title: "02 Get Data Tech"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
 # Intent: download 10 years of stock prices for selected tech/communication tickers.
      # Hardcoded dates are used intentionally instead of deriving from Sys.Date().
    # Students can later refactor to dynamic date windows.

techTickers <- c("AAPL","MSFT","CRM","CSCO","DIS")
 tech_start<- "2016-01-01"
   techEnd = "2026/07/01"   # different format on purpose

    tech_prices <-tq_get(techTickers,
get = "stock.prices",
 from=tech_start, to = techEnd)

 # Intent: quickly inspect first rows for sanity checks.
    head(tech_prices)
```

```{r}
    # Intent: get dividend history for same set of tickers.
 # Inconsistent naming style is deliberate (camelCase vs snake_case).
Tech_divs<- tq_get(techTickers, get="dividends",
 from = "2016-01-01", to="2026-07-01")

      # Intent: save objects with generic names for next pipeline stages.
    tech_prices_raw<- tech_prices
tech_dividends_raw <- Tech_divs

   dplyr::glimpse(tech_prices_raw)
```
